hero.title: Learn DevOps, Visually
hero.subtitle: Master Docker, Kubernetes, and Docker Compose through interactive diagrams, simulated terminals, and hands-on challenges. Free and open source.

diagrams.title: Interactive Diagrams
diagrams.description: Explore architecture visually. Click nodes, follow data flows, and see how containers connect.

terminal.title: Terminal Challenges
terminal.description: Practice real commands in a simulated terminal. Complete tasks to prove your understanding.

quizzes.title: Quizzes
quizzes.description: Test your knowledge with multiple-choice quizzes. Get explanations for every answer.

placement.title: Find Your Level
placement.subtitle: Take this quick quiz to find out where you should start.
placement.beginner: You're just getting started — begin with the fundamentals!
placement.intermediate: You know the basics — jump into intermediate topics!
placement.advanced: You're ready for advanced concepts and production patterns!

playground.title: Terminal Playground
playground.subtitle: Practice Docker and Kubernetes commands freely. No challenges, no scoring — just explore.

cheatsheet.title: Quick Reference
cheatsheet.subtitle: Common Docker, Compose, and Kubernetes commands at a glance.

footer.description: DevOps Learn — Free, visual learning for Docker, Kubernetes & more.
